---
title: "Research Dashboard"
---

## Project Overview

> **Replace this tagline** with one sentence stating the core contribution.

- **Problem**: [Domain] + [specific challenge] — why it matters now
- **Approach**: [Key method idea] — what makes it different
- **Outcome**: Target metric improvement over baseline on [dataset/benchmark]

```{dot}
//| label: fig-pipeline
//| fig-cap: "End-to-end research pipeline"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 3.5
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=TB
  graph [ranksep=0.55, nodesep=0.55]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.45, margin="0.15,0.08"]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph row1 {
    rank=same
    Task [label="Task Def", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    Lit  [label="Literature", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    Claim [label="Claims", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }
  subgraph row2 {
    rank=same
    Method [label="Method", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }
  subgraph row3 {
    rank=same
    Main  [label="Main Expt", fillcolor="#4a2040"]
    Abl   [label="Ablation", fillcolor="#4a2040"]
    HP    [label="HP Search", fillcolor="#4a2040"]
  }

  Task  -> Method
  Lit   -> Method
  Claim -> Method
  Method -> Main
  Method -> Abl
  Method -> HP
}
```

---

## Navigation

::: {.card-grid}
<div class="nav-card">
<a href="task_definition.qmd">Task Definition</a>
<p>Problem scope, RQs, evaluation criteria</p>
</div>
<div class="nav-card">
<a href="literature_review.qmd">Literature Review</a>
<p>Related work, gaps, positioning</p>
</div>
<div class="nav-card">
<a href="claims.qmd">Claims</a>
<p>Hypotheses, evidence, falsification</p>
</div>
<div class="nav-card">
<a href="method/overview.qmd">Method</a>
<p>Architecture, components, design choices</p>
</div>
<div class="nav-card">
<a href="experiments/overview.qmd">Experiments</a>
<p>Setup, results, analysis</p>
</div>
<div class="nav-card">
<a href="weekly_progress.qmd">Weekly Reports</a>
<p>Progress summary &amp; slide deck templates</p>
</div>
:::

---

## Key Results at a Glance

::: {.metric-row}
<div class="metric-badge">
<div class="value">—</div>
<div class="label">Primary Metric</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-badge">
<div class="value">—</div>
<div class="label">vs. Baseline Δ</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-badge">
<div class="value">—</div>
<div class="label">Dataset Size</div>
</div>
<div class="metric-badge">
<div class="value">—</div>
<div class="label">Model Params</div>
</div>
:::

> Fill in final numbers after main experiment is complete.

---

## Reproduction Quickstart

```bash
# 1. Setup
pip install -r requirements.txt

# 2. Debug run (fast, no logging)
python -m src.main mode=debug dataset=<dataset> method=<method>

# 3. Full training
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method>

# 4. Hyperparameter search
python -m src.main mode=optuna optuna.n_trials=50

# 5. Inference
python -m src.main mode=infer inference.checkpoint_path=<ckpt>
```
